markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of the new Webflow CMS for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CMS Fields Added:** New fields for `Meta Title`, `Meta Description`, and `Schema Markup` were added to enable SEO customization for each post.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Author Bios Required:** A new author bio section will be built, requiring 60–80 word bios from Krista to establish author expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Content Navigation:** A new footer with a sitemap will be added to ensure content is discoverable and to maintain a low click depth.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [**Table Support:** Webflow lacks native table support; content creators must use custom code blocks for tables.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)

## Topics

### CMS Functionality & SEO

  - [The CMS is in Webflow under `Contents` → `Content`.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Table of Contents (TOC):** Auto-generates from H2 and H3 tags in the body text.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [**SEO Fields:**](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [`Meta Title` & `Meta Description`: Added as distinct fields for custom SEO titles and descriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [`Schema Markup`: Added as a text field. The technical implementation for Google to recognize this markup is TBD.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)

### Author Bios

  - [**Requirement:** A bio and image are needed at the bottom of each post to establish author expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [A new `Teams` CMS collection will store author data (bio, avatar).](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [The author field in the `Content` CMS will become a dropdown linking to this collection.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [**Action:** Tanya will request 60–80 word bios from Krista.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)

### Content Navigation

  - [**Problem:** The site lacks a sitemap footer, making new content hard to find.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [**Solution:** Add a new footer column with a sitemap.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**Action:** William will ask Krista for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [**Related Action:** Remind Krista to provide the missing Privacy Policy page for the new footer.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

### Tables in Content

  - [**Limitation:** Webflow's rich text editor does not support native tables.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [**Workaround:** Use a custom code block to embed tables.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [**Decision:** Proceed with this workaround for now and revisit if a custom solution is needed later.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)

      - [Build the `Teams` CMS collection and link it to the `Content` CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [Design the author bio display for post pages.](https://fathom.video/share/zQtsbJvqCmg6qLjaaFhq1NVN8wXwcFZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
